ns0:entry.ns0:title: ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp
Language: typescript
Chrome DevTools for coding agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
Language: typescript
A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EveryInc/compound-engineering-plugin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EveryInc/compound-engineering-plugin
Language: typescript
Official Compound Engineering plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: actions/checkout
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/actions/checkout
Language: typescript
Action for checking out a repo

ns0:entry.ns0:title: angular/angular
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/angular/angular
Language: typescript
Deliver web apps with confidence 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apollographql/apollo-client
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apollographql/apollo-client
Language: typescript
The industry-leading GraphQL client for TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Vue, Angular, and more. Apollo Client delivers powerful caching, intuitive APIs, and comprehensive developer tools to accelerate your app development.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: babel/babel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/babel/babel
Language: typescript
🐠 Babel is a compiler for writing next generation JavaScript.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cypress-io/cypress
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cypress-io/cypress
Language: typescript
Fast, easy and reliable testing for anything that runs in a browser.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-labs-code/stitch-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-labs-code/stitch-skills
Language: typescript
A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grafana/grafana
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grafana/grafana
Language: typescript
The open and composable observability and data visualization platform. Visualize metrics, logs, and traces from multiple sources like Prometheus, Loki, Elasticsearch, InfluxDB, Postgres and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lfnovo/open-notebook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lfnovo/open-notebook
Language: typescript
An Open Source implementation of Notebook LM with more flexibility and features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/TypeScript
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/TypeScript
Language: typescript
TypeScript is a superset of JavaScript that compiles to clean JavaScript output.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/vscode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/vscode
Language: typescript
Visual Studio Code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nestjs/nest
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nestjs/nest
Language: typescript
A progressive Node.js framework for building efficient, scalable, and enterprise-grade server-side applications with TypeScript/JavaScript 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nrwl/nx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nrwl/nx
Language: typescript
The Monorepo Platform that amplifies both developers and AI agents. Nx optimizes your builds, scales your CI, and fixes failed PRs automatically. Ship in half the time.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nuxt/nuxt
Language: typescript
the full-stack Vue framework

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rowboatlabs/rowboat
Language: typescript
Open-source AI coworker, with memory

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shadcn-ui/ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui
Language: typescript
A set of beautifully-designed, accessible components and a code distribution platform. Works with your favorite frameworks. Open Source. Open Code.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stablyai/orca
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stablyai/orca
Language: typescript
Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: storybookjs/storybook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook
Language: typescript
Storybook is the industry standard workshop for building, documenting, and testing UI components in isolation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: supabase/supabase
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/supabase/supabase
Language: typescript
The Postgres development platform. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tailwindlabs/tailwindcss
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tailwindlabs/tailwindcss
Language: typescript
A utility-first CSS framework for rapid UI development.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
Language: typescript
This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
